name: Hot Tuna Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans tuna, chunk and light, 6.5 oz each
2 cups broccoli florets, cooked and drained
2 cups carrots, sliced, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise, lemon juice, dijon-style mustard, sugar, basil leaves, and salt.
2. Stir in the cooked pasta shells, tuna, broccoli, and carrots until evenly mixed.
3. Serve hot. Refrigerate leftovers.
